creator: itetcu@FreeBSD.org
text:
1. Please put the things in post-install in pkg-message and @${CAT} it
in post-install so that package users see it also.
2. You might want to adjust pkg-descr.

Eventually try to OPTIONify the port for RUN_DEPENDing on what enscript
port the user wants (and you could try to find if one of the enscript
ports is installed, of course).


-- 
IOnut - Un^d^dregistered ;) FreeBSD "user"
  "Intellectual Property" is   nowhere near as valuable   as "Intellect"

BOFH excuse #176:
vapors from evaporating sticky-note adhesives
